titleStmt.title: SII 9.642: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 642. (A.R. No. 734 of 1922.) ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE RUINED MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT ANTAPURAM, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1473, Virōdhikṛit, Āshāḍha, śu. 12 corresponding to A.D. 1551, June 15, Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Viṭhalarājayya, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Tirumalarājayya, purchased a fruit-garden at Āvinamaḍuvu and made a gift of it for the service of the god Mallikārjuna at Hiriya-Anantāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
vidyāśaṁkarāya namaḥ . gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ .
virūpākṣāya namaḥ . svasti śrījayādbhudaya
śālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1473 neya virōdhikṛ
tusaṁvatsarada Āśāḍha śudha 12 lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsi
vadēvamahārāyarū vidyānagaradalu ratnasiṁ
hāsanadalu prutvīsāṁbrājya Āḷuttaṁ yiralu
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarājatiruma
larājaAyyanavara komāra viṭhalarājayyanavaru Āvi
namaḍuvina kereya keḷagaṇa stāvaradoḷagaṇa timi
yabasavayyana kayyalu virupaṇagaḷu krayavāgi
koṁḍu tōṭadoḷagaṇa teṁgu
halasu māu hēruḷe niṁbe Ēnuṁṭāda phalaga
ḷa tōṭavanū hiriya Anaṁtāpurada ma
llikārjunadēvara Amrutapaḍige Ācaṁdrā
rkasthāyiyāgi yī tōṭada vakalapālu
rājapālu kuḷabirāḍa Ānītabirāḍa sahavā
gi sarvamānyavāgi mallikārjunadēvarige vi
ṭhalarājaĀyanavaru dvādaśeyā pu(ṁ)ṇya
kāladalū dhārayanū yeradu koṭṭaru
yī dharmmakke Āvanobbanū Aḷupidaru
Ātanē dēvatādrōhi yida Āḷu
pidavana bāyeli kate tuṁṇe kaḷḷu
ppu . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.642 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
